factors.summary: Free cash flow improved significantly year over year.

evidence.text: Free cash flow was $42.1 million for the three months ended December 31, 2022, compared to $(49.1) million for the three months ended December 31, 2021.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Free cash flow improved significantly from negative to positive year over year.

evidence.text: Organic sales growth is calculated by comparing organic sales to reported sales in the prior year, excluding divestitures.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Organic sales growth is positive, indicating growth without divestitures.
